🏮 Kanazawa Neighbourhood

Katamachi

Kanazawa's eating and drinking hub — from morning coffee to late-night izakayas, the city's most lived-in neighbourhood.

Quick Facts

🍻
Best for
Eating, drinking, nightlife, shopping
🚌
Getting there
Loop Bus (Korinbo stop), 20min walk from station
🕐
Time needed
Evening onwards
✨
Vibe
Lively, local, unpretentious

Ready to master
the city?
